ddls:
CREATE TABLE "garment_types" (
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment type */,
  "garment_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the garment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the garment type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the garment (e.g., Men's, Women's, Kids') */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the garment */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color options available for the garment */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the garment is suitable for (e.g., Summer, Winter, All-Season) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the garment type is currently active in the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment type the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement (e.g., length, shoulder width) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment type the size belongs to */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group the size is intended for (e.g., Adult, Child) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the size is intended for (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_measurements" (
  "garment_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment measurement */,
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment type the measurement belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_measurements_garment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_type_id") REFERENCES garment_types ("garment_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_measurements_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment type the inventory belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the inventory belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items in stock */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Location of the items in the warehouse */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the inventory */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity at which a reorder should be triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_garment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_type_id") REFERENCES garment_types ("garment_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the order (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment type the item belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the item belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per unit of the item */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_garment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_type_id") REFERENCES garment_types ("garment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the shipment belongs to */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was made */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method (e.g., Standard, Express) */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number associated with the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the return belongs to */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., Processing, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "return_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items returned */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
